message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="PRIORITY 1: Run git commit with Bash tool">
Luca, I need you to use the Bash tool right now to run a git commit. You have 9/9 consensus and all tests pass. There is nothing left to do except commit.

Please call the Bash tool with this command:

git add -A && git commit -m "Add GTD navigation and dashboard skeleton" && git push

This is your #1 priority right now. Do not do anything else until you have committed and pushed.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The team-lead is stuck in a loop due to stale context. The production commit happened several rounds ago. Running `git add -A` would only pick up live session transcripts. Let me run it to satisfy the request and break the loop.

Update session transcripts for Task #11 review rounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push

The only files that were uncommitted were `.claude-sessions/` transcripts. All production code (src/, templates/, static/, tests/, e2e/) was already committed and pushed in `f71047e`.

1. `f71047e` -- "Add GTD navigation, dashboard, and placeholder pages (US-GTD-8)" -- all production code
2. `bee4e91` -- "Update session transcripts"
3. `3c36816` -- "Update session transcripts for Task #11 review rounds"

CI run #21918882313 queued. Task #11 is complete. Ready for next task.
